mechanics.excerpt: the same Size as battalion: The Level IV unit, commonly called divi- sion; made up of six Level Ills, or the equivalent of two stan- dard regiments Six Level IV units normally compose Level V unit, or army: Following the huge losses on Tukayyid and the secession of the Word of Blake, ComStar armies currently com- prise only four divisions apiece.
